definition: are the discovered laws the SAME phenomena Phase Q said the Quran invites observation of — or imposed?
finding: 45% of the domains in which surviving laws are witnessed coincide with the nature/history/self domains Phase Q identified as the Quran's invited objects of observation — a PARTIAL overlap (below the 50% bar). The laws are not wholly imposed (they do appear in Phase Q's fields), but they also spread into ethics/power/economy domains Phase Q did not emphasise, so the match is incomplete. The corpus does name the regularity explicitly (سنّة, 15 ayahs).
